features: 🎁 [ Ideal Gift for Children and Girls ] - Maqhpu colouring pencils are the best gifts for children. Ideal gift choices for Easter, Children's Day, Back to School, Christmas, Stocking Fillers Kids, Children's Birthday Party Bag Fillers. Children will love drawing with Maqhpu colored pencils. They always create amazing works of art with colored pencils.

🎨[ Unique Color Effect ] - The pencil core has more than three different colors mixed, and the random colors seem to keep your drawing always surprising. You can easily switch between tones to create beautiful gradient and shading effects, enhancing the color of your drawing.

🎨[ 12 Rainbow Colors ] - There are 12 pencils of different colors in the box, they are beautiful combination colors, you can match multiple colors at the same time, making your creation more convenient. Great for handmade and DIY projects. All colors are extremely colorful, vibrant and long-lasting.

🎨[ Widely Use ] - These coloring pens can be used to color your books, design work, color sketches, doodles, creative painting, marking on books and many other uses. We can use it to draw anything we want. These pens come in a variety of colors, twist the tip to get different colors!

🎨[ Safe and Durable ] - The Rainbow Colored Pencils are made of premium black wood and high-quality pigments, they won't break easily, the pencil core is thicker, 0.5cm in diameter, and very durable! The black wood exterior of these pencils gives them a stylish and professional look, while the pre-sharpened tips ensure they're ready to use straight out of the box.
